modules.name: Monsoon
modules.description: VCV plugin inspired by Vermona meloDICER: stochastic melody & rhythm with edit-menu features

modules.name: MonsoonInterchangeExpander
modules.description: Semitone and Octave CV Modulation Expander

modules.name: Raffles
modules.description: Dice/draw-generation modulation expander (slew/mix CV + die-action gates)

modules.name: Junction
modules.description: Big-5 pattern-knob CV modulation expander (note value, variation, legato, rest, accent)

modules.name: Straits
modules.description: Poly base expander — per-voice REST/ACCENT probability + 16ch poly-cable outs (gate/CV/accent, ch1=mono)

modules.name: Causeway
modules.description: Poly CV modulation — 16ch REST + ACCENT modulation CV in (ch1=mono) with attenuverters

modules.name: Changi
modules.description: Per-voice output — poly voices 2..16 broken out to individual gate/CV/accent jacks

modules.name: Shophouse
modules.description: Scale expander — 4-front scale list, click-a-shutter root, boundary-quantised modulation, Conservation lock

modules.name: Sands Visual
modules.description: Monsoon Probability Visualisation, Manipulation, and Modulation Expander

modules.name: Straits East Sands Visual
modules.description: Monsoon Polyphonic Per Channel Probability Visualisation, Manipulation, and Modulation Expander — all 15 poly voices (V2-V16)

modules.name: Straits Sands Macro Visual
modules.description: Monsoon Polyphonic Global Macro Probability Visualisation, Manipulation, and Modulation Expander

modules.name: Lantern
modules.description: Read-only note-output visualiser for Monsoon — 16-lane display of notes, ties, legato and accents

modules.name: Change Alley
modules.description: Pin-matrix expander: reallocates which voice consumes which rhythm/melody random stream before all manipulation. EMS VCS3-style matrix, currency-pair labelled rows (the actual Change Alley FX booths vs USD).
